guests.name: TIP4P_DREIDING
guests.parameter_source: Jorgensen et al., J. Chem. Phys. (1983), with the packaged TIP4P_DREIDING.def geometry metadata.

guests.name: H2_DREIDING
guests.parameter_source: Garcia-Holley et al., ACS Energy Lett. 2018, 3, 748-754.

guests.name: N2_DREIDING
guests.parameter_source: Martin-Calvo et al., Phys. Chem. Chem. Phys. 2011, 13, 11165-11174.

guests.name: Xe_GENERICMOFS
guests.compatibility_note: Uses RASPA GenericMOFs guest parameters. The framework force field is selected independently and cofkit does not restrict that pairing.
guests.provenance_note: The GenericMOFs 221 K and 4.100 A values are distinct from the Xe4+4 row derived from cofkit's bundled Open Babel UFF.prm.

guests.name: Kr_GENERICMOFS
guests.compatibility_note: Uses RASPA GenericMOFs guest parameters. The framework force field is selected independently and cofkit does not restrict that pairing.
guests.provenance_note: The GenericMOFs 166.4 K and 3.636 A values are distinct from the Kr4+4 row derived from cofkit's bundled Open Babel UFF.prm.

guests.name: He_RASPA
guests.parameter_source: Hirschfelder, Curtiss, and Bird, Molecular Theory of Gases and Liquids, Wiley (1954), p. 1114, as packaged by RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField.
mixing_rule_rows: He_raspa lennard-jones 10.9 2.64 // RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField; Hirschfelder et al. (1954).
guests.compatibility_note: The framework force field is selected independently; validation of the chosen guest/framework combination remains the user's responsibility.
guests.provenance_note: Imported from the RASPA2 example molecule and force-field files. The site label was namespaced, an explicit origin was added, and the source's one-site flexible group was normalized to rigid; numerical parameters are unchanged.

guests.name: Ar_RASPA
guests.parameter_source: Martin-Calvo et al., Phys. Chem. Chem. Phys. 2011, 13, 11165-11174, as packaged by RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField.
mixing_rule_rows: Ar_raspa lennard-jones 124.070 3.38 // RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField; Martin-Calvo et al. (2011).
guests.compatibility_note: The framework force field is selected independently; validation of the chosen guest/framework combination remains the user's responsibility.
guests.provenance_note: Imported from the RASPA2 example molecule and force-field files. The site label was namespaced, an explicit origin was added, and the source's one-site flexible group was normalized to rigid; numerical parameters are unchanged. RASPA2's argon critical temperature and pressure closely repeat its O2 values, so independently validate them before requesting PR-EOS fugacity handling.

guests.name: CH4_RASPA
guests.parameter_source: Martin, Thompson, and Nenoff, J. Chem. Phys. 2001, 114, 7174-7181, as packaged by RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField.
mixing_rule_rows: CH4_raspa lennard-jones 158.5 3.72 // RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField; Martin et al. (2001).
guests.compatibility_note: The framework force field is selected independently; validation of the chosen guest/framework combination remains the user's responsibility.
guests.provenance_note: Imported from the RASPA2 example molecule and force-field files. The united-atom site label was namespaced, an explicit origin was added, and the source's one-site flexible group was normalized to rigid; numerical parameters are unchanged.

guests.name: O2_RASPA
guests.parameter_source: Martin-Calvo et al., Phys. Chem. Chem. Phys. 2011, 13, 11165-11174, as packaged by RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField.
mixing_rule_rows: O_o2_raspa lennard-jones 53.023 3.045 // RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField; Martin-Calvo et al. (2011).
O_com_raspa none // RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField; charge-only center site.
guests.compatibility_note: The framework force field is selected independently; validation of the chosen guest/framework combination remains the user's responsibility.
guests.provenance_note: Imported from the RASPA2 example molecule and force-field files. Site labels were namespaced for cofkit without changing geometry or numerical parameters.

guests.name: CO2_RASPA
guests.parameter_source: Garcia-Sanchez et al., J. Phys. Chem. C 2009, 113, 8814-8820, as packaged by RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField.
mixing_rule_rows: O_co2_raspa lennard-jones 85.671 3.017 // RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField; Garcia-Sanchez et al. (2009).
C_co2_raspa lennard-jones 29.933 2.745 // RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField; Garcia-Sanchez et al. (2009).
guests.compatibility_note: Alternative shifted-LJ CO2 model for use with the RASPA example-molecule family; it does not replace cofkit's default Potoff-Siepmann CO2 model.
guests.provenance_note: Imported from the RASPA2 example molecule and force-field files. Site labels and the selector were namespaced for cofkit without changing geometry or numerical parameters.

guests.name: N2_RASPA
guests.parameter_source: Martin-Calvo et al., Phys. Chem. Chem. Phys. 2011, 13, 11165-11174, as packaged by RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField.
mixing_rule_rows: N_n2_raspa lennard-jones 38.298 3.306 // RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField; Martin-Calvo et al. (2011).
N_com_raspa none // RASPA2 ExampleMoleculeForceField; charge-only center site.
guests.compatibility_note: Alternative shifted-LJ N2 model for use with the RASPA example-molecule family; it does not replace cofkit's default truncated-LJ N2 model.
guests.provenance_note: Imported from the RASPA2 example molecule and force-field files. Site labels and the selector were namespaced for cofkit without changing geometry or numerical parameters.
